insight: No gap still needs a hand
plainSummary: A path that says nothing is missing still needs teachers, vows, habits, and friends to keep us from drifting alone.
atAGlance: Some paths teach that the thing we seek is not far away. That does not make help unnecessary. Teachers, promises, daily conduct, and community protect us from turning closeness into pride, passivity, or loneliness. The test is whether support makes a life more honest.
keyPoints: Nearness is not permission to practice alone.
Without companions, a person can mistake certainty for freedom.
Watch whether ordinary commitments make humility and care more stable.
match: first ask if there is distance
